'''Ralph''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] employee who served for the [[Azzameen family]] company [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]]. He managed to escape from the facility when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] confiscated the business and its assets.

==Behind the scenes==
Ralph and fellow co-worker [[Norton]] are the only two employees mentioned in-game. This is most likely a tribute to [[Wikipedia:The Honeymooners|The Honeymooners]]' main male characters, Ralph Kramden and Ed Norton.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
